input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.12.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.12.2.2
            TITLE: the brake test passes if:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.12.2.2: The Brake Test passes if:
IN.12.2.2 The Brake Test passes if: 
• All four wheels lock up  
• The engine stays running during the complete test
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 116 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer:
The Brake Test passes if:
• All four wheels lock up
• The engine stays running during the complete test
